todo.text: [Trading] 🎁 Surprise MVP: add one small non-execution improvement concept for the trading bots, such as a diagnostics view, reporting helper, or review utility; deliverable: build brief or MVP spec in projects/autonomous-trading-bot/notes/ or projects/futures-bot/notes/ | Why: Useful surprise MVPs should strengthen systems that support trading outcomes | Proof: MVP is tightly scoped, clearly useful, and avoids unsafe live-trading config changes | Unlocks: Faster iteration on bot quality improvements

done.text: [Other] 🔧 Fix: identify one repetitive workspace workflow that wastes time, excluding openclaw.json and any live config mutation path; deliverable: markdown spec in projects/automation/ with evidence, proposed automation, and safe boundaries | Why: Reduces repetitive manual work, freeing time for skill-building | Proof: Spec identifies a real workspace bottleneck, excludes risky config edits, and defines safe input/output clearly | Unlocks: Progress toward: Write a simple script with input validation

[Other] 🔧 Fix: build one small automation utility that addresses one specific documented workspace friction point; deliverable: working script in scripts/ or projects/automation/ with a clear run command and verifiable output | Why: Reduces repetitive manual work, freeing time for skill-building | Proof: Script runs on a real workspace example, is bounded to one specific task, and produces an observable result without touching openclaw.json or live config | Unlocks: Progress toward: Write a simple script with input validation
🎁 Surprise MVP: build a tiny learning helper for Japanese, Python, or business-analysis practice, such as a prompt generator, drill picker, or review tracker
